tasks.title: Live Feed - Agent Communication
tasks.description: New sidebar page showing real-time feed of all agent communications. Username handles (@nova, @dev-lead, etc). Full history. Search/filter by agent.

steps.text: Design Live Feed page layout with message stream
Add username handles for all agents (@nova, @dev-lead, @research-lead)
Stream agent events from gateway WebSocket
Persist communication history
Add search and filter by agent

tasks.title: Org Chart Page
tasks.description: New sidebar page: visual org chart showing CEO → Nova (Orchestrator) → Department Leads → Team Members. Clear hierarchy, roles, responsibilities, communication flow.

steps.text: Design org chart component with visual hierarchy
Populate from ecosystem.json data
Add role descriptions and responsibilities
Show communication flow arrows between levels

tasks.title: Agent Task History in Detail Panel
tasks.description: When clicking an agent in Agent Hub, show their task history — what they accomplished, completion rate, recent activity. Currently only department-level.

steps.text: Track per-agent task assignments in kanban.json
Add task history tab to agent detail panel
Show completion stats and recent activity

tasks.title: Skills Page - Installed Skills Directory
tasks.description: New sidebar page listing all installed skills with descriptions, details, and which agents can use them.

steps.text: Scan skills directory from gateway API
Display skill cards with name, description, capabilities
Show which agents/departments have access to each skill
Add skill detail view with full documentation

tasks.title: Gateways Page - Gateway Management
tasks.description: New sidebar page for gateway management: connection status, connected devices, integrations, health metrics for distributed environments.

steps.text: Design Gateways page with connection status cards
Show gateway health, uptime, connected devices
Display device pairing requests and approvals
Show gateway configuration and integration status

tasks.title: Chat-to-Kanban Task Creation
tasks.description: Tell Nova a task via chat → task appears on Kanban board instantly. Support steps, priority, assignee.

steps.text: Add task creation intent parsing to Nova chat
Nova calls POST /api/tasks when user gives a task
Task appears on Kanban board in real-time via SSE
